note: Singapore public-source manifest for local AEC RAG review. PDFs are downloaded locally for inspection and are not committed to this repository.

sources.title: BCA Code on Accessibility in the Built Environment 2025
sources.rights: BCA copyright. Download for local reference; do not redistribute modified or copied content.
sources.source_note: Baseline accessibility requirements for Singapore built-environment work. Applies to new building works and A&A works according to BCA page.

sources.rights: SCDF public fire-code document. Download for local reference; review official site for latest terms and amendments.
sources.source_note: Fire safety code reference for Singapore buildings.

sources.rights: URA website content. Download for local reference; review official site for terms and latest updates.

sources.title: NEA Code of Practice on Environmental Health 2025
sources.rights: NEA public document. Download for local reference; review official site for latest terms and amendments.
sources.source_note: Environmental health requirements relevant to building design, refuse systems, public toilets, ventilation, and anti-mosquito breeding provisions.

sources.title: LTA Code of Practice for Works on Public Streets, June 2025 Edition
sources.rights: LTA public document. Download for local reference; review official site for latest terms and amendments.

sources.rights: LTA public document. Download for local reference; review official site for latest terms and amendments.

sources.title: PUB Codes of Practice and Standard Drawings
sources.rights: PUB website content. Download converted text for local reference; review official site for terms and latest updates.
sources.source_note: Official PUB index for drainage, coastal protection, sewerage/sanitary, and water-services codes and standard drawings.

sources.title: PUB Code of Practice on Surface Water Drainage, 7th Edition with Addendum No. 3
sources.rights: PUB public document. Download for local reference; review official site for latest terms and amendments.
sources.source_note: Drainage code covering minimum engineering requirements for surface water drainage, platform and crest levels, drainage reserves, flood protection, and construction drainage controls.

sources.title: PUB Code of Practice on Sewerage and Sanitary Works, 3rd Edition
sources.rights: PUB public document. Download for local reference; review official site for latest terms and amendments.
sources.source_note: Sewerage and sanitary works code covering public sewer connections, sewer protection, setbacks, sanitary drainage, and pumped sewage systems.

sources.title: NParks Guidelines on Greenery Provision and Tree Conservation for Developments, Version 5
sources.rights: NParks public document. Download for local reference; review official site and terms of access before use.
sources.source_note: Guidelines for greenery provision, tree planting, tree conservation, green buffers, development-plan clearance, and submission procedures.
